scores.correctness_notes: Core structure correct (temp_model fixture, deploy, wait with all_active/any_error), but fails to show the canonical active+idle combination using `jubilant.all_agents_idle` — instead invents a custom lambda with unconfirmed `.is_active` properties. The gold standard explicitly answers 'active/idle' with `lambda status: jubilant.all_active(status) and jubilant.all_agents_idle(status)`.
scores.hallucination_notes: Several unconfirmed items: `app.is_active` and `unit.is_active` properties not in gold standard; `juju.deploy()` keyword args `app=`, `num_units=`, `config=`, `resources=` not mentioned in gold standard; `juju.integrate()` not confirmed; `result.success`, `result.results` on action result not confirmed; `unit.workload_status.message` not confirmed. These may be real jubilant API surface but are not validated by the gold standard.
